name: Italian Minestrone Soup Coca-Cola
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Blade chuck roast OR Meaty soup bones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, combine the meat, water, salt, small onion, celery leaves, and bay leaf. Cover and simmer for about 2-1/2 hours until the meat is tender.
2. Remove the meat and strain the broth to measure 2 quarts. Add ice cubes to harden and remove the fat; discard the fat.
3. Finely dice the meat (about 2 cups), discarding any fat and bones.
4. In a 5 to 6 quart kettle or Dutch oven, combine the beef broth and diced meat. Place over low heat while preparing the rest of the ingredients.
5. Pan-fry the bacon until crisp. Add the bacon drippings and all remaining ingredients except Parmesan cheese to the broth.
6. Cover and simmer for about 30 minutes, until vegetables and macaroni are tender.
7. Serve sprinkled with Parmesan cheese if desired. Makes about 3 quarts.
